Name: Change Order
Gameplay_Text: Swap one Ops Kit requirement on any active Mission with another from the deck.

Name: Signal Interference
Gameplay_Text: Target player discards one card from their hand and draws a new card.

Name: Grounded
Gameplay_Text: Target player loses their next turn, or pause Mission Creep for one round.

Name: Cross-Training
Gameplay_Text: Change one skill point on any target Operator to a different skill category.

Name: Train Operator
Gameplay_Text: Target Operator gains one skill point in any of their existing skills
